app.name: CodeTester
app.description: A lightweight, no-login code playground for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python preview, and JSON.

features.label: Instant Run
features.desc: Zero build step. Hit Run and see results immediately.

features.label: Multi-file
features.desc: HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, and Python preview in one session.

features.label: Live Preview
features.desc: Side-by-side editor and preview, resizable to your flow.

features.label: Console Panel
features.desc: Capture logs, warnings, and errors right below the preview.

features.label: No account needed
features.desc: Lite by design. No login, no cloud save, just code.

features.label: Glass UI
features.desc: Crafted for focus — blur, depth, and calm dark aesthetics.
